Smoke Heating Product

Ploom X Advanced Starter Kit

Create your own Ploom X Advanced Starter Kit.

The Ploom X Advanced is a combination of rich smoke experience, high technology and unique style – all in perfect harmony to deliver the ultimate smoke heating pleasure. Upgrade now to a unique smoking experience with heating technology.

View Details

LEARN

Come and meet the Cannabis together

We are committed to spreading the culture and sensitivity that comes with the use of cannabis. We want to promote a positive attitude towards cannabis and dispel the stereotypes and misconceptions surrounding it. Our aim is to provide information and high quality p.

But what do you actually know about cannabis?

About Us

We invite you to visit our kiosk in Preveza to find the right product that meets your needs. We understand that choosing cannabis products can be exciting, but it can also be confusing. We are here to help you understand our products, quality and potential effects.
